evals.expected_output: Pulls latest, scans for proprietary info, validates dependency diagram, regenerates README, commits and pushes
expectations: Config read for repo_path, public_repo_path, and proprietary patterns
git pull or fetch upstream + merge performed
Stashed and popped if uncommitted changes would conflict
All */SKILL.md files scanned for proprietary information
Real customer names from Accounts/ folders checked against skill files
Contact names from Accounts/*/contacts/ checked against skill files
Proprietary findings auto-fixed: customer names replaced with Acme Corp/Globex/Initech
Config variable references ({config.*}) NOT flagged as proprietary
Skill dependency graph validated: SKILL.md files scanned for /sales-* invocations
Mermaid diagram edges compared against actual cross-skill references
Missing or extra edges updated in the diagram
README.md regenerated from skill frontmatter (descriptions, argument-hints)
README Skills table has correct skill names and descriptions from frontmatter
README follows the full template structure (TOC, Prerequisites, Setup, Workflow, Customizing)
All changed files staged
Commit message is concise and descriptive
Changes pushed to origin
Public repo synced: SKILL.md files copied with ld- to sales- renaming
Public README regenerated with sales-* naming
Public repo committed and pushed
If no changes (including README unchanged), reports everything up to date
